utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check the final property solution: it includes all six sections with details. Next, verify each is fully specified per its description: - property: includes selected property with details and price (address, type, bedrooms, size, features, condition, price) — fully specified. - financing: includes financing solution with terms (broker/contact, LTV, expected rate, down payment, fees, incentives) — terms provided — fully specified. - legal_services: includes legal services with costs (service name, cost, inclusions, timeline) — fully specified. - moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (service, cost, inclusions) — fully specified. - setup_services: utility and setup services (package, cost, included utilities, providers, timeline, survey) — fully specified. - total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property cost, each cost line, totals, remaining budget) — fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution includes specific items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings: Property: 'Family House' (purchase_properties). Financing: 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage aligns with 'First-Time Buyer' in purchase_financing. Legal services: 'Premium Legal Package' matches essential_legal_services. Moving services: 'Premium Moving Service' corresponds to 'Premium Moving'. Utility setup: 'Premium Utilities Package' corresponds to 'Premium Utilities'. Property survey: 'Full Structural Survey' matches property_surveys_inspections.
